build.beforeBuildCommand: npm run build && npm run build:user-guide-pdf

security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:8741 http://localhost:1421 ws://localhost:1421 https://asset.localhost ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' asset: https://asset.localhost blob: data:; media-src 'self' asset: https://asset.localhost blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:
